@graph.name: BBA in Data Analytics
@graph.description: Earn your BBA in Data Analytics and become a data-driven business professional. Learn Power BI, Python, SQL, and AI tools with 100% placement support at Teksversity.

mainEntity.name: What is the BBA in Data Analytics course about?

acceptedAnswer.text: BBA in Data Analytics is a three-year undergraduate degree that blends business management and data analysis. It focuses on using tools and techniques to turn raw data into actionable business insights.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in a BBA Data Analytics program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course includes Business Analytics, Python, Power BI, Excel, SQL, Data Visualization, Predictive Modelling, and AI concepts for strategic business decisions.

mainEntity.name: What are the career options after completing BBA in Data Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Data Analysts, BI Associates, Market Researchers, Business Strategists, or Data Visualization Experts in industries like IT, finance, and e-commerce.

mainEntity.name: Is Data Analytics a good career choice after BBA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it’s one of the fastest-growing careers in the world. Data analytics professionals are in high demand for roles that help businesses make smarter, evidence-based decisions.

mainEntity.name: What technical skills are needed for BBA Data Analytics students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students should learn Python, SQL, Excel, Power BI, and data storytelling, along with critical thinking, statistics, and visualization skills.

mainEntity.name: What makes Teksversity’s BBA in Data Analytics program unique?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity combines business strategy with real-time analytics projects, AI-based case studies, and mentorship from experienced data professionals to ensure job readiness.

mainEntity.name: From which university will I get my BBA degree if I study at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students earn their degree from a UGC-recognized university partner, ensuring national and international recognition for higher studies and employment.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide hands-on training and internships for Data Analytics students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students work on live data projects, simulations, and corporate internships using tools like Power BI, Tableau, and Excel Analytics.

mainEntity.name: What kind of placement support does Teksversity offer for BBA in Data Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance, including resume optimization, mock interviews, recruiter tie-ups, and career counseling for data-related roles.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide certification training along with the BBA degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students receive guidance for certifications in Power BI, Excel, and Google Analytics to improve their skills and employability.

heading: Overview of
MA in Public Policy And Governance

overViewImage.alt: MA in Public Policy and Governance – Program Overview

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Master Governance Systems, Policy Design & Public Leadership
overViewOfOnline.description: The MA in Public Policy & Governance at Teksversity offers a comprehensive understanding of how institutions function, how policies are shaped, and how governance frameworks influence social and economic outcomes. The program helps learners develop clarity in public systems, administrative processes, regulatory structures, and development planning. Students gain exposure to evidence-based policy approaches, real governance challenges, socio-economic assessments, and public sector problem-solving. With a blend of conceptual grounding and practical application, the course prepares graduates to work confidently in government bodies, NGOs, policy think tanks, consulting firms, and development organizations, contributing to effective governance and impactful policy solutions.
keyPoints: Master foundations of public policy and governance
Build strong research and policy analysis skills
Use tools for policy review and assessment
Prepare for public administration and research roles

heading: Why Choose MA in Public Policy And Governance at
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity offers a future-ready public policy curriculum designed by governance experts, ensuring students learn through real policy cases, administrative frameworks, and development models. The program blends theory with hands-on policy practice effectively.

description.firstDescription: Learners gain practical exposure through governance simulations, policy labs, analytical workshops, and socio-economic assessments. These experiences help students understand real-world challenges and build confidence in public leadership and decision-making roles.

description.secondDescription: With personalized mentorship, research guidance, and career-focused support, Teksversity prepares students for impactful careers in government, NGOs, consulting, and policy institutions. The program emphasizes applied learning and professional readiness.

faq.question: What is an MA in Public Policy & Governance?
faq.answer: MA in Public Policy & Governance is a postgraduate program that trains students to analyze, design, and implement public policies while understanding governance structures, administration processes, and societal impact.

faq.question: What subjects are covered in this course?
faq.answer: The program includes public administration, policy analysis, governance, economics, political science, public law, and research methodology.

faq.question: What skills will I gain from this program?
faq.answer: Learners gain skills in policy formulation, research and analysis, governance evaluation, strategic planning, data interpretation, leadership, and professional communication.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after this course?
faq.answer: Graduates can work as Policy Analysts, Public Administrators, Government Consultants, Research Associates, Social Sector Managers, NGO Advisors, and roles in international policy organizations.

faq.question: Can I pursue this course after graduation in any field?
faq.answer: Yes, graduates from various disciplines are eligible to apply. Some universities may give preference to students with backgrounds in social sciences, economics, or political studies.

faq.question: Will this course help me build a career in government or public sector roles?
faq.answer: Yes, the program prepares students for roles in government bodies, public policy institutions, administrative departments, and regulatory organizations.

faq.question: Can I pursue higher studies after completing this program?
faq.answer: Yes, students can continue with MPhil, PhD, or other advanced research and specialization programs in public policy, governance, or development studies.

faq.question: What are the eligibility requirements for this course?
faq.answer: Applicants should hold a bachelor’s degree from a recognized university. Some institutions may also require entrance tests, interviews, or merit-based selection.

faq.question: Can I specialize in a specific area during this course?
faq.answer: Yes, many programs offer specializations such as Policy Analysis, Governance Reforms, Public Administration, Development Policy, and International Governance.

faq.question: What key skills do employers seek in graduates?
faq.answer: Employers look for analytical thinking, research expertise, policy drafting, strategic decision-making, governance understanding, communication ability, and strong problem-solving skills.
